meta: Jeremy (Lei) Ying — Accounting (FinTech), audit, finance and data.
role: Accounting (FinTech) student seeking an Audit & Assurance internship.
summary: I combine financial reporting, careful documentation and practical digital tools to support accurate, well-structured work.
availability: Available for Audit & Assurance internships · Feb–Apr 2027
privacyLine: For professional enquiries, please use LinkedIn. This site neither publishes nor collects private contact details.
profileIntro: I focus on accounting fundamentals, audit-ready documentation and practical, technology-supported analysis.
focus1Desc: Financial working papers, supporting schedules, document checks and structured review.
focus2Desc: Hands-on exposure to Excel, SQL accounting software, Oracle and internal ERP workflows.
focus3Desc: Python and AI-assisted tools used for research, analysis and clear communication.
experienceIntro: Experience in project finance documentation and accounting operations, supported by Accounting (FinTech) studies.
exp1Desc: Prepared financial working papers, checked supporting documents, assisted with IPC payments and organised project finance data for review.
exp2Desc: Organised accounting and purchasing records, monitored purchase orders, tracked expenses and supported year-end reporting.
educationDesc: Building practical knowledge of financial reporting, audit, taxation, analytics and technology-supported accounting.
approachIntro: A practical workflow for organising evidence, checking detail and turning finance information into concise, review-ready outputs.
approach1Desc: Keep source documents, supporting schedules and working papers traceable for review.
approach2Desc: Organise accounting and finance information into consistent files, concise notes and reliable hand-offs.
approach3Desc: Use Excel, accounting systems, Python and AI-assisted tools where they improve accuracy, analysis or communication.
highlight1Desc: Applied machine learning and data analysis to a sustainability challenge in a global competition.
highlight2Desc: Practised audit judgement, structured reasoning, professional ethics and business problem-solving.
highlight3Desc: Worked through practical business scenarios using Malaysian tax knowledge.
highlight4Desc: Practised case analysis, structured problem-solving and professional communication.
credentialsIntro: Selected learning completed across markets, finance, ESG and emergency response.
credentialAha: American Heart Association First Aid, CPR & AED
connectText: Please contact me through LinkedIn. This website does not publish or collect private contact information.
